prerequisites.value: Ability to cast spells; ifrit, oread, sylph, or undine.

description.value: **Benefit:** Whenever you’re adjacent to an ifrit, oread, sylph, or undine ally who also has this feat, you can spontaneously replace or split a spell’s damage when casting it, as though the spell were affected by Elemental Spell (without using a higher-level spell slot). The type of energy damage depends on your ally’s race: acid for oread, electricity for sylph, fire for ifrit, or cold for undine.
